misc: Struggles with his gender identity, occasionally participating in events under his female alter-ego, "Eva".
biography: Marcus, representing Kurk Golf, prepares to embark on his thirteenth appearance at the esteemed Hector Trophée 2026. This remarkable consistency, spanning over a decade, firmly establishes him as an enduring fixture within this distinctive pair competition, a testament to his unwavering dedication to the sport.

Throughout his twelve previous participations, Marcus has navigated the challenging formats of the Hector Trophée with persistent effort. While he has not yet etched his name onto the coveted Hector Trophée for team victory, nor claimed the prestigious individual Victor Trophy, his commitment to the greens and fairways has been absolute, consistently seeking to elevate his performance against a formidable field.

Beyond his competitive resolve, Marcus is a competitor whose journey is marked by a profound individuality. He is notably recognized for his unique personal expression, occasionally gracing the tournaments under the guise of his female alter-ego, Eva. This distinctive facet of his persona adds an extraordinary dimension to his presence, highlighting a complex and evolving identity within the traditional framework of competitive golf.

As Marcus once again prepares to tee off, his active status and long-standing engagement signify a continued pursuit of excellence. Spectators and fellow competitors alike will observe with interest whether this upcoming event will mark a breakthrough, culminating in the long-sought accolades that would further enrich his unique legacy within the tournament's storied history.
